name: R5ContactDetailElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 ContactDetail to FHIR R4 ContactDetail
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 ContactDetail to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `ContactDetail.name` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ContactDetail.name` as `Equivalent`.
If there is no named individual, the telecom information is for the organization as a whole.

Element `ContactDetail.name` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ContactDetail.name` as `Equivalent`.
If there is no named individual, the telecom information is for the organization as a whole.
Element `ContactDetail.telecom` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ContactDetail.telecom` as `Equivalent`.
Element `ContactDetail.telecom` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ContactDetail.telecom` as `Equivalent`.
